svg.title: bRAG About It system architecture
svg.desc: Two-path flowchart showing the agent pipeline. A user question enters the chitchat router. Chitchat routes to a direct LLM reply. Lookup routes through retrieval, an optional query rewrite step if confidence is below 0.33, prompt assembly, and finally the LLM to produce a grounded answer. Chroma DB and the movies.json corpus feed the retrieval step.
